name: Codex Compacted - Recovery Message
description: Sends recovery instructions after Codex context compaction

text.customValue:
Your agent session id (sessionId): {{sessionIdShort}}
Your agent name: {{agentName}}
! Important: Re-load your agent profile by using devchain_get_agent_by_name to refresh SOP instructions and continue working !

[CONTEXT RECOVERY] Your conversation was compacted. Follow your SOP's Context Recovery Protocol:
1. Re-load your agent profile: devchain_get_agent_by_name(name='{{agentName}}')
2. Check your assigned tasks: devchain_list_assigned_epics_tasks(agentName='{{agentName}}')
3. For each in-progress task, read the full epic and ALL comments to recover context
4. Resume work from your last checkpoint comment
